series_metadata.series_description: The Media Correspondence is a compilation of media advisories releases, and news outlet reports relating to BWC business. The Media Correspondence documents are created via the computer, list the dates of the press clips and media advisories. The Communications Division is to redact any confidential information in press releases and media advisories prior to being sent to the media. These records may be of historical value. Any information of historical value will be printed on paper and sent to the State Archives at the Ohio Historical Society within two years of creation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Provide printed copies of Media Correspondence that is of historical value State Archives. ; Electronic: , and
